forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,50 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: f980
+title: 'Commands: actually generalize CopyCmd/CutCmd/PasteCmd to read ctx.target (blocks tag.yaml + task.yaml cleanup)'
+---
+## What
+
+Card 01KPG5XK61ND4JKXW3FCM3CC97 (\"Commands: generalize copy/cut to work on any entity type\") and 01KPG5YB7GTQ6Q3CEQAMXPJ58F (\"Commands: paste dispatcher mechanism\") were marked done but the legacy `CopyCmd` / `CutCmd` / `PasteCmd` in `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/clipboard_commands.rs` were NOT generalized. They still dispatch via `ctx.has_in_scope(\"tag\") || ctx.has_in_scope(\"task\")` and call `tag::CopyTag` / `task::CopyTask` directly. The YAML for `entity.copy` / `entity.cut` / `entity.paste` in `swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/entity.yaml` still declares `params: [{name: task|column, from: scope_chain, entity_type: ...}]` instead of `{name: moniker, from: target}`.
+
+This blocks two cleanup cards:
+- 01KPG6XPMDHSH8PMD248YK6KAK (tag.yaml cleanup) ŌĆö removing `entity.archive/copy/cut` from tag.yaml entity breaks 4 scope_commands tests because the cross-cutting auto-emit pass requires `from: target` to surface these on a tag scope.
+- 01KPG6XDVSY9DAN2TS26W52NN6 (task.yaml cleanup) ŌĆö same issue.
+
+### Required changes
+
+1. **`swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/entity.yaml`** ŌĆö change `entity.copy`, `entity.cut`, `entity.archive`, `entity.unarchive` params to `[{name: moniker, from: target}]` (entity.archive/unarchive already done; copy/cut still on `from: scope_chain`). `entity.paste` is more nuanced ŌĆö its destination comes from scope chain in the legacy impl; the new `PasteEntityCmd` (matrix dispatcher) reads `ctx.target` instead, so registration needs to flip from `PasteCmd` to `PasteEntityCmd` AND param needs to be `{name: moniker, from: target}`.
+
+2. **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/clipboard_commands.rs`** ŌĆö `CopyCmd`/`CutCmd` rewrite:
+   - `available()` returns true when `ctx.target` parses to a moniker of a known entity type (task/tag/project/column/board/actor).
+   - `execute()` reads `ctx.target` moniker, parses `entity_type:id`, dispatches to the entity-specific copy/cut operation. Need polymorphic dispatch ŌĆö currently only `task::CopyTask` and `tag::CopyTag` exist. Each entity type needs a copy implementation that snapshots fields into the clipboard payload via `EntityContext::read`.
+   - Delete the legacy task-only/tag-only branching.
+
+3. **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/mod.rs`** ŌĆö verify `entity.paste` is registered to `PasteEntityCmd` (matrix dispatcher), not legacy `PasteCmd`. Delete legacy `PasteCmd` once `PasteEntityCmd` covers all paths.
+
+4. **Update tests** ŌĆö the 4 scope_commands tests that depend on entity.copy/cut surfacing on tag scope via per-entity opt-ins need to either be deleted (if they're stale) or rewritten to assert auto-emit instead.
+
+### Acceptance criteria
+
+- [ ] `entity.copy` / `entity.cut` declare `from: target` in entity.yaml.
+- [ ] `CopyCmd::available` returns true for any known entity moniker target.
+- [ ] After copying a tag with target `tag:X`, `UIState::clipboard_payload()` contains the tag's type, id, and fields.
+- [ ] After this card lands, removing `entity.copy/cut/archive` from `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/{tag,task}.yaml` does NOT break any scope_commands tests (tag.yaml + task.yaml cleanup cards become unblocked).
+- [ ] Legacy `PasteCmd` is deleted; only `PasteEntityCmd` (matrix dispatcher) handles `entity.paste`.
+
+### Tests
+
+- [ ] Add `copy_entity_works_on_tag_via_target` ŌĆö dispatch entity.copy with target `tag:X`, assert clipboard contains tag fields.
+- [ ] Add `copy_entity_works_on_project_via_target`, `copy_entity_works_on_column_via_target`, `copy_entity_works_on_actor_via_target`.
+- [ ] Existing copy/cut tests updated to use target-driven availability.
+- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban` ŌĆö all green except the deliberately-RED hygiene test.
+
+### Workflow
+
+Use `/tdd`. Write `copy_entity_works_on_tag_via_target` first; it fails until the generalization lands.
+
+#commands
+
+This is the corrective task for un-finished work in 01KPG5XK61ND4JKXW3FCM3CC97 and 01KPG5YB7GTQ6Q3CEQAMXPJ58F. Once this lands, 01KPG6XPMDHSH8PMD248YK6KAK and 01KPG6XDVSY9DAN2TS26W52NN6 unblock.
\ No newline at end of file

-## What
-
-Card 01KPG5XK61ND4JKXW3FCM3CC97 (\"Commands: generalize copy/cut to work on any entity type\") and 01KPG5YB7GTQ6Q3CEQAMXPJ58F (\"Commands: paste dispatcher mechanism\") were marked done but the legacy `CopyCmd` / `CutCmd` / `PasteCmd` in `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/clipboard_commands.rs` were NOT generalized. They still dispatch via `ctx.has_in_scope(\"tag\") || ctx.has_in_scope(\"task\")` and call `tag::CopyTag` / `task::CopyTask` directly. The YAML for `entity.copy` / `entity.cut` / `entity.paste` in `swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/entity.yaml` still declares `params: [{name: task|column, from: scope_chain, entity_type: ...}]` instead of `{name: moniker, from: target}`.
-
-This blocks two cleanup cards:
-- 01KPG6XPMDHSH8PMD248YK6KAK (tag.yaml cleanup) ŌĆö removing `entity.archive/copy/cut` from tag.yaml entity breaks 4 scope_commands tests because the cross-cutting auto-emit pass requires `from: target` to surface these on a tag scope.
-- 01KPG6XDVSY9DAN2TS26W52NN6 (task.yaml cleanup) ŌĆö same issue.
-
-### Required changes
-
-1. **`swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/entity.yaml`** ŌĆö change `entity.copy`, `entity.cut`, `entity.archive`, `entity.unarchive` params to `[{name: moniker, from: target}]` (entity.archive/unarchive already done; copy/cut still on `from: scope_chain`). `entity.paste` is more nuanced ŌĆö its destination comes from scope chain in the legacy impl; the new `PasteEntityCmd` (matrix dispatcher) reads `ctx.target` instead, so registration needs to flip from `PasteCmd` to `PasteEntityCmd` AND param needs to be `{name: moniker, from: target}`.
-
-2. **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/clipboard_commands.rs`** ŌĆö `CopyCmd`/`CutCmd` rewrite:
-   - `available()` returns true when `ctx.target` parses to a moniker of a known entity type (task/tag/project/column/board/actor).
-   - `execute()` reads `ctx.target` moniker, parses `entity_type:id`, dispatches to the entity-specific copy/cut operation. Need polymorphic dispatch ŌĆö currently only `task::CopyTask` and `tag::CopyTag` exist. Each entity type needs a copy implementation that snapshots fields into the clipboard payload via `EntityContext::read`.
-   - Delete the legacy task-only/tag-only branching.
-
-3. **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/mod.rs`** ŌĆö verify `entity.paste` is registered to `PasteEntityCmd` (matrix dispatcher), not legacy `PasteCmd`. Delete legacy `PasteCmd` once `PasteEntityCmd` covers all paths.
-
-4. **Update tests** ŌĆö the 4 scope_commands tests that depend on entity.copy/cut surfacing on tag scope via per-entity opt-ins need to either be deleted (if they're stale) or rewritten to assert auto-emit instead.
-
-### Acceptance criteria
-
-- [ ] `entity.copy` / `entity.cut` declare `from: target` in entity.yaml.
-- [ ] `CopyCmd::available` returns true for any known entity moniker target.
-- [ ] After copying a tag with target `tag:X`, `UIState::clipboard_payload()` contains the tag's type, id, and fields.
-- [ ] After this card lands, removing `entity.copy/cut/archive` from `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/{tag,task}.yaml` does NOT break any scope_commands tests (tag.yaml + task.yaml cleanup cards become unblocked).
-- [ ] Legacy `PasteCmd` is deleted; only `PasteEntityCmd` (matrix dispatcher) handles `entity.paste`.
-
-### Tests
-
-- [ ] Add `copy_entity_works_on_tag_via_target` ŌĆö dispatch entity.copy with target `tag:X`, assert clipboard contains tag fields.
-- [ ] Add `copy_entity_works_on_project_via_target`, `copy_entity_works_on_column_via_target`, `copy_entity_works_on_actor_via_target`.
-- [ ] Existing copy/cut tests updated to use target-driven availability.
-- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban` ŌĆö all green except the deliberately-RED hygiene test.
-
-### Workflow
-
-Use `/tdd`. Write `copy_entity_works_on_tag_via_target` first; it fails until the generalization lands.
-
-#commands
-
-This is the corrective task for un-finished work in 01KPG5XK61ND4JKXW3FCM3CC97 and 01KPG5YB7GTQ6Q3CEQAMXPJ58F. Once this lands, 01KPG6XPMDHSH8PMD248YK6KAK and 01KPG6XDVSY9DAN2TS26W52NN6 unblock.
\ No newline at end of file

changes.value:
## What

Card 01KPG5XK61ND4JKXW3FCM3CC97 (\"Commands: generalize copy/cut to work on any entity type\") and 01KPG5YB7GTQ6Q3CEQAMXPJ58F (\"Commands: paste dispatcher mechanism\") were marked done but the legacy `CopyCmd` / `CutCmd` / `PasteCmd` in `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/clipboard_commands.rs` were NOT generalized. They still dispatch via `ctx.has_in_scope(\"tag\") || ctx.has_in_scope(\"task\")` and call `tag::CopyTag` / `task::CopyTask` directly. The YAML for `entity.copy` / `entity.cut` / `entity.paste` in `swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/entity.yaml` still declares `params: [{name: task|column, from: scope_chain, entity_type: ...}]` instead of `{name: moniker, from: target}`.

This blocks two cleanup cards:
- 01KPG6XPMDHSH8PMD248YK6KAK (tag.yaml cleanup) ŌĆö removing `entity.archive/copy/cut` from tag.yaml entity breaks 4 scope_commands tests because the cross-cutting auto-emit pass requires `from: target` to surface these on a tag scope.
- 01KPG6XDVSY9DAN2TS26W52NN6 (task.yaml cleanup) ŌĆö same issue.

### Required changes

1. **`swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/entity.yaml`** ŌĆö change `entity.copy`, `entity.cut`, `entity.archive`, `entity.unarchive` params to `[{name: moniker, from: target}]` (entity.archive/unarchive already done; copy/cut still on `from: scope_chain`). `entity.paste` is more nuanced ŌĆö its destination comes from scope chain in the legacy impl; the new `PasteEntityCmd` (matrix dispatcher) reads `ctx.target` instead, so registration needs to flip from `PasteCmd` to `PasteEntityCmd` AND param needs to be `{name: moniker, from: target}`.

2. **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/clipboard_commands.rs`** ŌĆö `CopyCmd`/`CutCmd` rewrite:
   - `available()` returns true when `ctx.target` parses to a moniker of a known entity type (task/tag/project/column/board/actor).
   - `execute()` reads `ctx.target` moniker, parses `entity_type:id`, dispatches to the entity-specific copy/cut operation. Need polymorphic dispatch ŌĆö currently only `task::CopyTask` and `tag::CopyTag` exist. Each entity type needs a copy implementation that snapshots fields into the clipboard payload via `EntityContext::read`.
   - Delete the legacy task-only/tag-only branching.

3. **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/mod.rs`** ŌĆö verify `entity.paste` is registered to `PasteEntityCmd` (matrix dispatcher), not legacy `PasteCmd`. Delete legacy `PasteCmd` once `PasteEntityCmd` covers all paths.

4. **Update tests** ŌĆö the 4 scope_commands tests that depend on entity.copy/cut surfacing on tag scope via per-entity opt-ins need to either be deleted (if they're stale) or rewritten to assert auto-emit instead.

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `entity.copy` / `entity.cut` declare `from: target` in entity.yaml.
- [ ] `CopyCmd::available` returns true for any known entity moniker target.
- [ ] After copying a tag with target `tag:X`, `UIState::clipboard_payload()` contains the tag's type, id, and fields.
- [ ] After this card lands, removing `entity.copy/cut/archive` from `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/{tag,task}.yaml` does NOT break any scope_commands tests (tag.yaml + task.yaml cleanup cards become unblocked).
- [ ] Legacy `PasteCmd` is deleted; only `PasteEntityCmd` (matrix dispatcher) handles `entity.paste`.

### Tests

- [ ] Add `copy_entity_works_on_tag_via_target` ŌĆö dispatch entity.copy with target `tag:X`, assert clipboard contains tag fields.
- [ ] Add `copy_entity_works_on_project_via_target`, `copy_entity_works_on_column_via_target`, `copy_entity_works_on_actor_via_target`.
- [ ] Existing copy/cut tests updated to use target-driven availability.
- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban` ŌĆö all green except the deliberately-RED hygiene test.

### Workflow

Use `/tdd`. Write `copy_entity_works_on_tag_via_target` first; it fails until the generalization lands.

#commands

This is the corrective task for un-finished work in 01KPG5XK61ND4JKXW3FCM3CC97 and 01KPG5YB7GTQ6Q3CEQAMXPJ58F. Once this lands, 01KPG6XPMDHSH8PMD248YK6KAK and 01KPG6XDVSY9DAN2TS26W52NN6 unblock.
Commands: actually generalize CopyCmd/CutCmd/PasteCmd to read ctx.target (blocks tag.yaml + task.yaml cleanup)

\ No newline at end of file
+This is the corrective task for un-finished work in 01KPG5XK61ND4JKXW3FCM3CC97 and 01KPG5YB7GTQ6Q3CEQAMXPJ58F. Once this lands, 01KPG6XPMDHSH8PMD248YK6KAK and 01KPG6XDVSY9DAN2TS26W52NN6 unblock.
+
+### Implementation notes (2026-04-20 corrective pass)
+
+State found on dispatch:
+- `entity.yaml` ŌĆö `entity.copy/cut/paste/archive/unarchive` already declared `params: [{name: moniker, from: target}]`. No edit needed.
+- `clipboard_commands.rs` ŌĆö `CopyEntityCmd`, `CutEntityCmd`, `PasteEntityCmd` (matrix dispatcher) already implemented and tested; the requested `copy_entity_works_on_{tag,task,project,column,actor}_via_target` tests already in place.
+- `mod.rs::register_clipboard` ŌĆö already wires `entity.paste` to `PasteEntityCmd::new()`.
+- `tag.yaml` and `task.yaml` ŌĆö neither lists `entity.copy/cut/archive`. The auto-emit pass surfaces them based on the entity's moniker via the cross-cutting registry.
+
+Cleanup applied this pass:
+- Deleted dead aliases `pub use CopyEntityCmd as CopyCmd; pub use CutEntityCmd as CutCmd;` from `clipboard_commands.rs` (no consumers).
+- Updated `swissarmyhammer-kanban/tests/command_dispatch_integration.rs::entity_copy_copies_task_to_clipboard` to dispatch with `target: Some("task:<id>")` instead of stale `scope: ["task:<id>"]` ŌĆö the integration test was the last consumer of legacy scope-driven copy.
+- Updated 5 stale availability tests in `commands/mod.rs` (`paste_*_available_with_*`, `paste_not_available_without_scope`) to drive `entity.paste` via `target` rather than `scope`, matching the production `from: target` contract.
+- Replaced the placeholder `cut_tag_not_available_without_task_parent` assertion in `scope_commands.rs` with the now-correct invariant: `entity.cut` on a `tag:X` target without a task in scope must NOT surface (no destructive op exists).
+- Refreshed two doc comments in `scope_commands.rs` referencing `PasteCmd::available()` to `PasteEntityCmd::available()`.
+
+Verification:
+- `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban` ŌĆö 1145/1145 passed.
+- `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-commands` ŌĆö 175/175 passed.
+- `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban scope_commands` ŌĆö 82/82 passed (acceptance test).
+- `cargo clippy -p swissarmyhammer-kanban --all-targets` ŌĆö clean.
\ No newline at end of file

changes.forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 ## What

-Card 01KPG5XK61ND4JKXW3FCM3CC97 (\"Commands: generalize copy/cut to work on any entity type\") and 01KPG5YB7GTQ6Q3CEQAMXPJ58F (\"Commands: paste dispatcher mechanism\") were marked done but the legacy `CopyCmd` / `CutCmd` / `PasteCmd` in `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/clipboard_commands.rs` were NOT generalized. They still dispatch via `ctx.has_in_scope(\"tag\") || ctx.has_in_scope(\"task\")` and call `tag::CopyTag` / `task::CopyTask` directly. The YAML for `entity.copy` / `entity.cut` / `entity.paste` in `swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/entity.yaml` still declares `params: [{name: task|column, from: scope_chain, entity_type: ...}]` instead of `{name: moniker, from: target}`.
+Card 01KPG5XK61ND4JKXW3FCM3CC97 ("Commands: generalize copy/cut to work on any entity type") and 01KPG5YB7GTQ6Q3CEQAMXPJ58F ("Commands: paste dispatcher mechanism") were marked done but the legacy `CopyCmd` / `CutCmd` / `PasteCmd` in `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/clipboard_commands.rs` were NOT generalized. They still dispatch via `ctx.has_in_scope("tag") || ctx.has_in_scope("task")` and call `tag::CopyTag` / `task::CopyTask` directly. The YAML for `entity.copy` / `entity.cut` / `entity.paste` in `swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/entity.yaml` still declares `params: [{name: task|column, from: scope_chain, entity_type: ...}]` instead of `{name: moniker, from: target}`.

 This blocks two cleanup cards:
 - 01KPG6XPMDHSH8PMD248YK6KAK (tag.yaml cleanup) ŌĆö removing `entity.archive/copy/cut` from tag.yaml entity breaks 4 scope_commands tests because the cross-cutting auto-emit pass requires `from: target` to surface these on a tag scope.

-- [ ] After this card lands, removing `entity.copy/cut/archive` from `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/{tag,task}.yaml` does NOT break any scope_commands tests (tag.yaml + task.yaml cleanup cards become unblocked).
-- [ ] Legacy `PasteCmd` is deleted; only `PasteEntityCmd` (matrix dispatcher) handles `entity.paste`.
